title: Hephaestus Provenance Schema
description: Schema for provenance tracking records. Every dispatched hypothesis and every merge must contain provenance. A merge without provenance must fail validation.

entity_type.description: Type of entity this provenance tracks.

entity_id.description: ID of the entity (hypothesis_id, belief_id, etc.).

channel.description: Channel that generated this entity: orchestrator, reflector, analogy, replay, dream, whisper, calibration, explorer, red_team, or human.

source.description: Specific source identifier within the channel.

run_id.description: Run ID that produced this entity, if applicable.

relies_on.description: IDs of hypotheses this entity relies on. For idempotent blame propagation.

cost_usd.description: Monetary cost (USD) incurred to produce this entity.
